Look up at the stars, explore without li: Look up at the stars, explore without limits.
No custom tutorial content has been conf: No custom tutorial content has been configured yet. You can maintain rich text or an external page from system settings, and this page will follow the current light or dark theme.

Update pricing settings and click save w: Update pricing settings and click save when you're done.
Update basic model settings and click sa: Update basic model settings and click save when you're done.
Update private upstream pricing settings: Update private upstream pricing settings for administrators and click save when you're done.
Only enable this for upstreams with inva: Only enable this for upstreams with invalid/self-signed certificates or IP-based certificates without SAN.
Only the new frontend is enabled. Change: Only the new frontend is enabled. Changes take effect after page reload.
Expose your public service status page d: Expose your public service status page directly on the overview dashboard
When enabled, the overview page will dis: When enabled, the overview page will display the public service health panel.
Point this to a public Uptime Kuma statu: Point this to a public Uptime Kuma status page that already exists.
Example: url = http://uptime-kuma:3001,: Example: url = http://uptime-kuma:3001, slug = newapi. The slug must match the status page slug configured in Uptime Kuma.
No status pages yet. Click \"Add status: No status pages yet. Click "Add status page" to create one.
Configure the public status page source: Configure the public status page source shown on the overview dashboard
Display name shown in the overview panel: Display name shown in the overview panel
When set, subscription quota can only be: When set, subscription quota can only be used for the selected models.
Show a visible purchase entry in the use: Show a visible purchase entry in the user payment page and redirect users to an external platform to obtain redemption codes.
e.g. Purchase a code on the external pla: e.g. Purchase a code on the external platform, then return here and redeem it below.
This will permanently delete the plan wh: This will permanently delete the plan when it has no subscription records. This action cannot be undone.
After cancelling, the subscription ends: After cancelling, the subscription ends immediately and you will receive {{amount}} back to balance.
Get a redemption code from the external: Get a redemption code from the external platform, then enter it below to add balance.
Get a code from the card above, then ent: Get a code from the card above, then enter it here to add balance.
This will permanently delete the plan wh: This will permanently delete the plan when it has no active subscriptions. This action cannot be undone.
Initial USD balance given to new users: Initial USD balance given to new users
USD reward given to users who invite oth: USD reward given to users who invite others
USD reward given to invited users: USD reward given to invited users
Limits are enforced on rolling 5-hour, 2: Limits are enforced on rolling 5-hour, 24-hour, and 7-day windows.
View profit placeholders and future prof: View profit placeholders and future profitability reports.
Conservative profitability workspace for: Conservative profitability workspace for subscription income, upstream cost, and exchange-rate adjustments.
This page is live as a structural placeh: This page is live as a structural placeholder. The next step is to wire in a conservative formula that accounts for rolling subscription limits, refunds, plan duration, upstream pricing, and historical exchange-rate changes without overstating profit.
Natural day profit from 00:00 to now: Natural day profit from 00:00 to now
Closed profit for the last completed nat: Closed profit for the last completed natural day
The production version will break profit: The production version will break profit into income, realized cost, deferred liability, refunds, and exchange-rate deltas.
User recharge exchange-rate history, ups: User recharge exchange-rate history, upstream quota-to-USD history, model upstream/downstream pricing snapshots, rolling subscription limits, subscription purchases, refunds, and cancellation rebates.
Any ambiguous or unfinished consumption: Any ambiguous or unfinished consumption should bias toward lower reported profit, so the board never shows artificial gains while hidden liabilities still exist.
Reserved sections for the next coding ro: Reserved sections for the next coding round
Choose whether the code is an internal g: Choose whether the code is an internal gift or an externally sold balance code.
Used later by profit monitoring to evalu: Used later by profit monitoring to evaluate externally sold redemption codes.
Configure exchange rates and profit-moni: Configure exchange rates and profit-monitor parameters
Configure default exchange rates, breaka: Configure default exchange rates, breakage recognition, and retention ranges used by the profit workspace.
Default sell-side exchange rate snapshot: Default sell-side exchange rate snapshot used when RMB income is converted to USD-denominated quota.
How long to keep verbose profit-monitor: How long to keep verbose profit-monitor detail records available for drill-down.
Default sell-side exchange-rate snapshot: Default sell-side exchange-rate snapshot used when RMB income is converted to USD-denominated quota. Example: 7.20 : 1.00 means 7.20 CNY = 1 USD. (legacy example)
Default time range used by profit trend: Default time range used by profit trend charts before administrators switch the interval manually.
When subscriptions expire and remaining: When subscriptions expire and remaining quota is forfeited, allow profit monitoring to treat the residual liability as breakage income.
Configure the upstream settlement exchan: Configure the upstream settlement exchange rate for this channel only. This value is used by profit accounting snapshots.
Default sell-side exchange-rate snapshot: Default sell-side exchange-rate snapshot used when RMB income is converted to USD-denominated quota. Example: 1 CNY = 0.1389 USD.
Each bound upstream channel can override: Each bound upstream channel can override the default upstream pricing. These values stay private to administrators.
Wallet and subscription value not yet re: Wallet and subscription value not yet realized
Operating profit is the primary metric: Operating profit is the primary metric
This workspace now reads from wallet lot: This workspace now reads from wallet lots, subscription lots, usage settlements, finance ledgers, and breakage settlements. Historical rows keep their own exchange-rate and pricing snapshots instead of being recalculated with current settings.
Aggregated from the selected accounting: Aggregated from the selected accounting period
This page now reflects the intended prod: This page now reflects the intended production layout: headline profit indicators, trend charts, parameter volatility views, and expandable full-chain accounting details. The remaining step is to wire the real ledgers and formulas.
Aligned with dashboard model-call analyt: Aligned with dashboard model-call analytics, but focused on profit-oriented metrics.
All values below are cumulative within t: All values below are cumulative within the currently selected period and are separated by accounting role.
Track exchange-rate and fee fluctuations: Track exchange-rate and fee fluctuations that can materially change operating profit.
These rules are intentionally conservati: These rules are intentionally conservative to avoid showing fake profit.
Subscription expiry immediately forfeits: Subscription expiry immediately forfeits remaining entitlement and can be recognized as breakage when enabled.
Subscription cancellation returns remain: Subscription cancellation returns remaining value to wallet liability instead of treating it as profit reduction.
These cards define the next production w: These cards define the next production widgets that will be filled by actual ledgers.
Expandable accounting drill-down for the: Expandable accounting drill-down for the selected period. Each block shows cumulative values already realized in this time range.
Cumulative values inside the current per: Cumulative values inside the current period
Expandable accounting notes for day, wee: Expandable accounting notes for day, week, and future custom periods. This area is designed for deep audit-style drill-down.
Recharge orders, externally sold redempt: Recharge orders, externally sold redemption codes, and breakage recognition.
RMB recharge orders converted to quota w: RMB recharge orders converted to quota with historical downstream exchange rates.
Wallet-to-subscription transfers tracked: Wallet-to-subscription transfers tracked as liability migrations instead of new income.
Upstream token pricing, channel-specific: Upstream token pricing, channel-specific exchange rates, and payment-related finance costs.
Per-request upstream settlement should u: Per-request upstream settlement should use the bound channel exchange-rate snapshot.
Payment fees stay in finance ledgers and: Payment fees stay in finance ledgers and are not allocated inside hot-path request settlements.
Subscription cancellations, liability re: Subscription cancellations, liability refunds, and after-sales revenue adjustments.
Unused balance refunds reduce liability: Unused balance refunds reduce liability and cash flow, but do not automatically reduce profit.
Operational profit workspace for daily p: Operational profit workspace for daily profit, liabilities, trend diagnostics, and drill-down accounting chains.
The final formula should remain conserva: The final formula should remain conservative and never report profit before liabilities are truly released.
Natural-day operating profit, gross prof: Natural-day operating profit, gross profit, cash flow, liability balance, breakage recognition, and after-sales deductions will be separated instead of collapsed into one opaque number.
Wallet lots, subscription liability lots: Wallet lots, subscription liability lots, redemption-code sale metadata, per-channel upstream exchange rates, and upstream pricing snapshots by model-channel pair.
Unused balance refunds reduce liability: Unused balance refunds reduce liability and cash flow. They should only reduce profit when they are actually compensating already-recognized revenue.
Manage subscription plan duration, rolli: Manage subscription plan duration, rolling limits, pricing and status
Enable this to expose the model in the i: Enable this to expose the model in the image-generation workspace.

Only the latest generated image, your cu: Only the latest generated image, your current reference images, and your prompt are sent upstream.
